overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk urban plaza, likely from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring multi-level walkways, holographic advertisements, cherry blossom trees, and bustling NPC activity. The camera moves from covered walkways through elevated promenades and down to street level with futuristic traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered commercial walkway with wooden decking. The camera moves forward past a wall of illuminated vending machines and a large digital billboard on the left. A character with distinctive pink hair passes by on the left as the camera approaches a green-tinted glass ceiling structure ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway onto an elevated promenade with views of a multi-level plaza below. The walkway features metal railings and overlooks trees and circular seating pods. The camera passes underneath an overhead pedestrian bridge while continuing forward along the wooden deck.

The camera passes other pedestrians while overlooking the lower plaza levels with stairs and seating areas visible below.

A massive building with curved digital billboards dominates the left side while a couple embraces on the right, overlooking the lower plaza. The scene opens up to show multiple levels of the commercial district with cherry blossom trees and market stalls below.

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs toward the lower plaza level, moving past cherry blossom trees with pink blooms. White umbrella canopies of food stalls become visible below, while futuristic vehicles begin to appear on the street level to the left. The ground transitions from wooden deck to paved tiles.

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk at street level with futuristic vehicles including a yellow taxi passing by on the left. A modern transit shelter stands on the right while the camera approaches a lower plaza area with food stalls. The environment features digital building facades and street furniture with glowing accents.

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into the lower plaza area featuring food stalls with white umbrellas and digital menu boards. The space includes seating areas, stairs leading to upper levels, and scattered pedestrians browsing the vendors. The environment transitions from the busy street to this more relaxed commercial plaza setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined commercial corridor into an expansive, tree-lined elevated promenade overlooking a futuristic plaza. It begins within a covered walkway of wooden decking, gliding past glowing vending machines and a large digital billboard as a pink-haired character passes by. As the camera reaches a green-tinted glass ceiling, it emerges from the enclosure onto an open promenade featuring metal railings and views of circular seating pods in the plaza below. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under an overhead pedestrian bridge, moving further along the wooden deck where the environment becomes densely lined with mature trees. Finally, the camera continues forward through dappled shadows and passing pedestrians, overlooking the multi-level stairs and seating areas of the urban center.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban overlook down into a bustling, multi-level commercial plaza. It begins by rounding a corner to reveal a wide urban canyon dominated by curved digital billboards and cherry blossom trees, with a couple embracing on a high balcony overlooking the district. As the camera descends a set of stairs, the wooden decking transitions to paved tiles and the view opens up to reveal white umbrella canopies and futuristic vehicles on the street level below. The scene then shifts to a concrete sidewalk where a yellow taxi passes by a modern transit shelter, moving alongside glowing building facades and street furniture. Finally, the camera glides from the busy street into the heart of the lower plaza, settling among the food stalls and digital menu boards where pedestrians browse in a more relaxed commercial setting.
